repair_candidate.summary: Finalize the existing editable contributor PR #94016 for the gateway channel recovery bug. The intended code path is already present on fetched head c3214be17af5ad7ea898d44dbf2109303eb6f411: after a timed-out recovery stop, the first monitor-triggered start records restartPending and returns, while a later start pass clears the stale task/abort state and proceeds into channel startup.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): resume channel after pending task recovery
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Finalizes #94016 as the canonical fix for #94008.
- Keeps the first stop-timeout recovery pass deferred, then lets a later monitor/start pass clear stale pending task state and start the channel.
- Preserves @sheyanmin's source PR work and credits @thomasthelen-kibeauftragter's report.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts -t "resumes startup on the second recovery pass"`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` before merge; address any findings.
validation_commands: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts -t "resumes startup on the second recovery pass"
credit_notes: Preserve PR credit for @sheyanmin via source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94016.
Do not edit CHANGELOG.md in this normal PR; keep release-note context in the PR body or squash message.
